info.title: Business Card Platform API
info.description: A production-ready FastAPI backend for a Business Card Platform using MongoDB Atlas.

post.description:
Standard OAuth2 compatible token login. 
Expects username (email) and password in form data.
Alternative login endpoint that accepts JSON body instead of form data.
Refresh access token using a valid refresh token.
